task_completion.description: Log in to OpenCAD using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD interface is visible and the user is logged in (e.g., dashboard is displayed, user profile indicates admin).
The screen shows the 'Police Dashboard' or a similar law enforcement specific interface within OpenCAD.

task_completion.description: Locate the existing arrest report for civilian 'Elena Fisher'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search result, list, or record view displaying 'Elena Fisher' and the original charge of 'Petty Theft'.

task_completion.description: Update the charge field from 'Petty Theft' to 'Grand Larceny'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form or input field for the arrest report where the charge has been changed to 'Grand Larceny'.

task_completion.description: Save the report and ensure all other details remain unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen or the updated record view showing the charge as 'Grand Larceny' for 'Elena Fisher', while the original narrative (e.g., 'Suspect apprehended at jewelry store...') is still present and unaltered.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenCAD graphical user interface in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the OpenCAD web application is used, rather than terminal windows executing curl requests or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to update the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL or SQLite UPDATE commands are visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual application forms to make the update.
integrity.visual_evidence: The update is performed within the standard OpenCAD UI, not by editing HTML in browser developer tools or typing the expected output into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target civilian: Elena Fisher. Old charge: Petty Theft. New charge: Grand Larceny. To verify that 'all other report details remain unchanged', check that the narrative still contains: 'Suspect apprehended at jewelry store attempting to conceal earrings. Suspect was cooperative.'
